narration: Define an input container div with class 'input-container' containing an input field of type 'text' with ID 'input-todo' and a button with ID 'add-todo'.
Define a to-do container div with class 'todo-container' containing multiple to-do items, each represented by a div with class 'todo'.
Inside each to-do div, include a checkbox input of type 'checkbox' and a button with text 'Delete'.
In the body, set the font-family to a custom value and change the background-color to 'wheat'.
Apply 'text-align: center' to the H1 heading.
Set the 'input-container' to 'display: flex', 'flex-direction: column', and 'align-items: center'.
